name: Easy Loans
description_short: Payment 1 Financial offers personal installment loans and title loans in Albuquerque, NM, with flexible payment terms and same-day funding for qualified applicants.
description_long:
Payment 1 Financial has operated a physical branch in Albuquerque, New Mexico since April 2008, serving the local community with in-person loan services. The company operates from 6125 Montgomery Blvd. NE and maintains extended business hours (Mon-Fri 9 AM-6 PM, Sat 9 AM-1 PM) to accommodate working customers. They position themselves as a personalized lending alternative with emphasis on flexible payment schedules and fast approval processes.

Payment 1 offers two primary loan products: Personal Installment Loans for unplanned expenses, emergencies, and general needs, and Title Loans using vehicle equity as collateral while allowing customers to retain vehicle use. Both products claim competitive rates, flexible payment options, and rapid funding. Personal loans can be applied for online or in-person, while title loans require in-branch evaluation. The company advertises same-day or next-day funding through check issuance or debit card deposit.

The company distinguishes itself through in-person service with local staff, extended Saturday hours, and explicit accommodation of customer payment schedules. They highlight credit-building as a benefit of their loans and display 7,008 verified customer reviews across Google, Facebook, and other platforms, claiming a 5/5 rating. The application process requires substantial documentation (proof of income, address, SSN/EIN, photo ID, 5 references, and recent bank statements), suggesting more thorough underwriting than typical payday lenders.

A significant limitation is that this company operates only as a single physical location in Albuquerque; there is no indication of online lending capability despite website language suggesting it. The website title contains a geographic error ("Albuquerque, Texas" when the business is in New Mexico), and the business hours listed in two places differ slightly (9 AM-5 PM vs. 9 AM-6 PM on weekdays), suggesting potential information maintenance issues. While positioned as a personal loan lender, the title loan component and rapid funding model place this squarely in the personal loans category rather than emergency cash.
pros: Extended business hours including Saturday 9 AM-1 PM availability for working customers
Explicit promise to accommodate payment schedules to fit individual customer budgets
Same-day or next-day funding available through check or debit card deposit
Title loan customers retain vehicle use during repayment while using it as collateral
Online application option available for personal loans without requiring in-branch visit
Transparent application requirements clearly listed upfront (5 references, recent bank statements, etc.)
7,008 verified customer reviews across multiple platforms with 5/5 rating
cons: Single physical location in Albuquerque only with no other branches or online-only alternative
Requires extensive documentation including 5 personal references, which may deter some applicants
Website contains factual errors (title says 'Albuquerque, Texas' when business is in New Mexico) and inconsistent hours (9 AM-5 PM vs. 9 AM-6 PM)
No published APR, fees, loan amount ranges, or credit requirements disclosed on website
Title loan process requires in-person vehicle appraisal, limiting accessibility for remote applicants
best_for: Albuquerque, NM residents with emergency or planned expenses needing personal installment loans
Vehicle owners with clear titles seeking quick cash loans with retained vehicle use
Borrowers who prefer in-person service and relationship-based lending over online-only platforms
Customers who need flexible payment accommodation based on individual income schedules
diagnosis: Payment 1 Financial is best for Albuquerque residents who need personal installment loans or title loans and prefer in-person service with flexible payment options. The main caveat is that this is a single-location lender with no online lending platform, making it inaccessible to customers outside the Albuquerque area, and critical information like APR, fees, and loan limits are not published on their website.
services: Personal Installment Loans for emergencies, home repairs, and unplanned expenses
Title Loans using vehicle equity with customer retains driving privileges
In-person loan applications at physical branch location
Same-day or next-day funding via check or debit card deposit
Flexible payment plan customization based on customer budget
Credit building through installment loan repayment
Vehicle title lien placement and removal services
Quick credit and underwriting review process
